identification_1_remark: ID notes: Original ID of C. aleuticas on field label, later changed to C. asper by unknown person. Both highly unlikely. Det Artedius lateralis by KM Cassidy, Oct 2020. Band of scades characteristic of Artedius between dorsal fins and lateral line. No scales on head, 2 cirri at corner of jaw, etc. This is a marine sculpin far inland. Could find no records of this species occuring inland. Human transport? Fish accidently put in jar with the wrong field tag?

identification_1_remark: ID notes for 21-343 to -347. These 5 fish IDed by collectors as "juvenile Sebastodes." ID of Copper Rockfish by KMCassidy, Oct 2020. Low/moderate confidence. Preservation has removed most of the red and yellow pigment useful in Rockfish ID. ID was based on head spines (5 pairs), concave/flat space between eyes, fin ray counts, the likelihood of the species at that location, and the faint color pattern that could be deduced. Quillback Rockfish also possible, but couldn't see any remnant of black speckling on throat and dorsal fin spines don't seem incised enough. Need examination by a rockfish expert.
event_verbatim_locality: Eliot Bay, King Co., Washington

identification_1_remark: ID to genus by collectors; ID to species by KM Cassidy, Oct 2020. High confidence in genus, low conf in species. In favor of S. variabilis: no head spines, has pale area at base of anal fins and low pectoral, dorsal spine and ray count consistent. Against: not common so far south; usually in deeper water, has more mottling and faint images of patches than illustrated in guides. Needs examination by someone more experienced in rockfish ID.
locality_specific: Rosario Bay, off Rosario Head and Northwest Island

identification_1_remark: ID to genus by collectors; ID to species by KM Cassidy, Oct 2020. High confidence in genus, low conf in species. In favor of S. variabilis: no head spines, has pale area at base of anal fins and low pectoral, dorsal spine and ray count consistent. Against: not common so far south; usually in deeper water, has more mottling and faint images of patches than illustrated in guides. Needs examination by someone more experienced in rockfish ID.
locality_specific: Rosario Bay, off Rosario Head and Northwest Island
